    Then status 200 # the status code response should be 200
    PassTo get all the data from application in XML format using path variable
    * url baseUrl
    [print] 22:09:10.444 Running in env: stage
    And path '/normal/webapi/all'
    And header Accept = 'application/xml'
    When method get # Send the get request
    [print] 22:09:10.454 request: 1 > GET http://localhost:9897/normal/webapi/all 1 > Accept: application/xml 1 > Host: localhost:9897 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/21.0.10) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate 22:09:10.481 response time in milliseconds: 20 1 < 200 1 < X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff 1 < X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block 1 < Cache-Control: no-cache, no-store, max-age=0, must-revalidate 1 < Pragma: no-cache 1 < Expires: 0 1 < X-Frame-Options: DENY 1 < Content-Type: application/xml 1 < Transfer-Encoding: chunked 1 < Date: Mon, 20 Apr 2026 16:39:10 GMT 1 < Keep-Alive: timeout=60 1 < Connection: keep-alive 9980Software Engg -     Then status 200
    * def entry = karate.filter(response, function(x){ return x.jobId == 1 && x.jobTitle == 'Software Engg' })[0]
    And match entry.jobId == 1
    And match entry.experience[1] == 'Apple'
    And match entry.project[0].projectName == 'Movie App'
    And match entry.project[0].technology[2] == 'Gradle'
    And match entry.experience == '#[3]'
    And match entry.project[0].technology == '#[3]'
    And match entry.experience[*] == ['Google','Apple','Mobile Iron']
    And match entry.project[0].technology[*] == ['Kotlin','SQL Lite','Gradle']
    And match entry.experience[*] contains ['Mobile Iron','Apple']
    And match entry.project[0].technology[*] contains ['SQL Lite']
    And match response.[*].jobId contains 1
    PassTo get the data in JSON format and validate using fuzzy matcher
    * url baseUrl
    [print] 22:09:10.887 Running in env: stage
    Given path '/normal/webapi/add'
    And request {"jobId": 1, "jobTitle": "Software Engg", "jobDescription": "To develop andriod application", "experience": ["Google", "Apple", "Mobile Iron"], "project": [{"projectName": "Movie App", "technology": ["Kotlin", "SQL Lite", "Gradle"]}]}

    Then status 200
    * def entry = karate.filter(response, function(x){ return x.jobId == 1 && x.jobTitle == 'Software Engg' })[0]
    And match entry.jobId == '#present'
    And match entry.experience[1] == '#notnull'
    And match entry.project[0].projectName == '#ignore'
    And match entry.project[0].technology == '#array'
    And match entry.jobTitle == '#string'
    And match entry.jobId == '#number'
    And match entry.jobId == '#? _ >= 1'
    And match entry.jobTitle == '#string? _.length == 13'
    And match entry.experience == '#[]'
    And match entry.experience == '#[3]'
    And match entry.experience == '#[3] #string'
    And match entry.experience == '#[3] #string? _.length >= 2'
    FailTo get the data in XML format
    * url baseUrl
    [print] 22:09:10.960 Running in env: stage
    Given path '/normal/webapi/add'
    And request {"jobId": 1, "jobTitle": "Software Engg", "jobDescription": "To develop andriod application", "experience": ["Google", "Apple", "Mobile Iron"], "project": [{"projectName": "Movie App", "technology": ["Kotlin", "SQL Lite", "Gradle"]}]}

    * def actualResponse = read('classpath:datafiles/JsonResponse.json')
    And print "File ==> ", actualResponse
    [print] 22:09:11.216 [print] File ==> [ { "jobId": 1, "jobTitle": "Software Engg", "project": [ { "technology": [ "Kotlin", "SQL Lite", "Gradle" ], "projectName": "Movie App" } ], "jobDescription": "To develop andriod application", "experience": [ "Google", "Apple", "Mobile Iron" ] } ]
    * def filteredResponse = karate.filter(response, function(x){ return x.jobId == 1 && x.jobTitle == 'Software Engg' })
    And match filteredResponse[0] == actualResponse[0]
    PassTo get the data in xml format
    * url baseUrl
    [print] 22:09:11.233 Running in env: stage
    Given path '/normal/webapi/add'
    And request {"jobId": 1, "jobTitle": "Software Engg", "jobDescription": "To develop andriod application", "experience": ["Google", "Apple", "Mobile Iron"], "project": [{"projectName": "Movie App", "technology": ["Kotlin", "SQL Lite", "Gradle"]}]}

  • Variables Creation in Karate Framework

    10:09:16 pm / 00:00:00:002 Pass

    Variables Creation in Karate Framework
    04.20.2026 10:09:16 pm 04.20.2026 10:09:16 pm 00:00:00:002 · #test-id=741
    PassTo create a Variable
    * def app_name = "Google"
    [print] 22:09:11.271 Running in env: stage
    * def page_lode_timeout = 20
    Given def var_int = 10
    And def var_string = "Karate"
    Then print "Int Variable ==> ", var_int
    [print] 22:09:11.281 [print] Int Variable ==> 10
    And print "String Variable ==> ", var_string
    [print] 22:09:11.283 [print] String Variable ==> Karate
    * def var_int_2 = var_int + 10
    And print "New Variable ==> ", var_int_2
    [print] 22:09:11.303 [print] New Variable ==> 20
    And print "BackGroud Section Variabel ==> ", app_name , page_lode_timeout
    [print] 22:09:11.337 [print] BackGroud Section Variabel ==> Google 20
    PassAcces the Variable
    * def app_name = "Google"
    [print] 22:09:11.346 Running in env: stage
    * def page_lode_timeout = 20
    * def var_int = 1
    * def var_string = "New"
    * def var_int_2 = var_int + 90
    Given print "Previous Scenario ==> ", var_int
    [print] 22:09:11.353 [print] Previous Scenario ==> 1
    And print "Previous Scenario ==> ", var_string
    [print] 22:09:11.357 [print] Previous Scenario ==> New
    And print "Previous Scenario ==> ", var_int_2
    [print] 22:09:11.360 [print] Previous Scenario ==> 91
    And print "BackGroud Section Variabel ==> ", app_name , page_lode_timeout
    [print] 22:09:11.361 [print] BackGroud Section Variabel ==> Google 20

  • To test the mock API created using WireMock standalone server

    10:09:16 pm / 00:00:00:000 Pass

    To test the mock API created using WireMock standalone server
    04.20.2026 10:09:16 pm 04.20.2026 10:09:16 pm 00:00:00:000 · #test-id=762
    PassValidate SUCCESS response
    * def baseUrl = wiremockurl
    [print] 22:09:11.369 Running in env: stage
    Given url baseUrl + '/payment/status'
    When method GET
    [print] 22:09:11.390 request: 1 > GET http://localhost:9898/payment/status 1 > Host: localhost:9898 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/21.0.10) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate 22:09:11.466 response time in milliseconds: 75 1 < 200 1 < Matched-Stub-Id: cf34f808-f564-43f2-bc18-ca359fd582b1 1 < Transfer-Encoding: chunked
    Then status 200
    And match response.status == 'SUCCESS'
    And match response.message == 'Payment processed'
    PassValidate FAILURE response
    * def baseUrl = wiremockurl
    [print] 22:09:11.476 Running in env: stage
    Given url baseUrl + '/payment/status?type=fail'
    When method GET
    [print] 22:09:11.484 request: 1 > GET http://localhost:9898/payment/status?type=fail 1 > Host: localhost:9898 1 > Connection: Keep-Alive 1 > User-Agent: Apache-HttpClient/4.5.14 (Java/21.0.10) 1 > Accept-Encoding: gzip,deflate 22:09:11.504 response time in milliseconds: 19 1 < 500 1 < Matched-Stub-Id: 947fd221-f156-40cd-9433-8fd77b0913c0 1 < Transfer-Encoding: chunked
    Then status 500
    And match response.status == 'FAILED'
    And match response.message == 'Payment declined'

  • To create the Job entry in the application

    10:09:16 pm / 00:00:00:005 Pass

    To create the Job entry in the application
    04.20.2026 10:09:16 pm 04.20.2026 10:09:16 pm 00:00:00:005 · #test-id=777
    Use POST /normal/webapi/add to create job entry in the application
    PassTo create the Job Entry in JSON format
    * url baseUrl
    [print] 22:09:11.518 Running in env: stage
    Given path '/normal/webapi/add'
    And request { "jobId": 5,"jobTitle": "Software Engg - 2", "jobDescription": "To develop andriod application", "experience": [ "Google", "Apple", "Mobile Iron", "Google" ], "project": [ { "projectName": "Movie App", "technology": [ "Kotlin", "SQL Lite","Gradle", "Jenkins" ] } ]}
